/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/test_grouped_gemm.dir/tests/test_correctness.cu.o CMakeFiles/test_grouped_gemm.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o test_grouped_gemm  libgrouped_gemm.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
